## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Arena.im to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and optimization opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [101 articles published, 93 indexed; significant uptick in impressions (+8,000) week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [New brand community topics added (e.g., Harley Davidson, Apple, Starbucks) for potential account-based marketing](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Need to implement conversion tracking and optimization (e.g., exit pop-ups, newsletter signups) to measure ROI](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [Discussions around increasing publishing cadence and improving author attribution for AI compliance](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [101 articles published, 93 indexed](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [8,000+ increase in impressions week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Clicks showing positive trend, though slower growth than impressions](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Team believes they're approaching a "tipping point" for significant growth](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)

### Author Attribution and AI Compliance

  - [Need to change author names from "Arena" to individual names (e.g., Paulo, Paola) for AI compliance](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Considering adding LinkedIn links and bios for authors to enhance authority](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Paulo requested export of published article URLs to integrate with Looker dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)

### New Content Topics

  - [Added brand community topics (rows 29-47 in Airtable)](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Focus on well-known brands with existing online communities (e.g., Harley Davidson, Apple, Starbucks)](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Potential for account-based marketing approach using these articles](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)

### Publishing Cadence

  - [Currently at 3 articles per day (45/month)](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Discussed potentially increasing to 4-5 per day, but decided to maintain current pace due to review workload](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)

### Conversion Optimization

  - [Jimmy emphasized need to implement conversion tracking (e.g., newsletter signups, exit pop-ups)](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [Suggested comparing performance of AI vs. human-written articles after 2 months of indexing](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Recommended using HubSpot for conversion tracking and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)

### Traffic Quality and ROI Measurement

  - [Discussion about convincing Paulo (likely a decision-maker) to implement conversion tracking](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [Current traffic at \~125 clicks per week, but quality of traffic more important than quantity](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [Consideration of using Clearbit or similar tool for better visitor insights, despite budget constraints](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to export published article URLs to a Google Sheet for Paulo to integrate with Looker dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [Team to review and approve new brand community topics (rows 29-47 in Airtable)](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Paulo to create analysis comparing AI vs. human-written article performance](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Jimmy to follow up with Paulo separately about implementing conversion tracking and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [Consider implementing HubSpot tracking and potentially switching to Clearbit for better visitor insights](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [Continue monitoring SEO performance and adjust strategy as needed](https://fathom.video/share/3YjbeK_8xR_VXFHVGUyGHUVtKRNLktzX?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
